onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a transcription model

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: English only. The best model for English speakers.

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3.name: Parakeet V3
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3.description: Fast and accurate. Supports 25 European languages.

parakeet-unified-en-0.6b-int8.name: Parakeet Unified
parakeet-unified-en-0.6b-int8.description: Fast English transcription with local realtime streaming.

moonshine-base.name: Moonshine Base
moonshine-base.description: Very fast, English only. Handles accents well.

moonshine-small-streaming-en.name: Moonshine V2 Small
moonshine-small-streaming-en.description: Fast, English only. Good balance of speed and accuracy.

breeze-asr.name: Breeze ASR
breeze-asr.description: Optimized for Taiwanese Mandarin. Code-switching support.

sense-voice-int8.name: SenseVoice
sense-voice-int8.description: Very fast. Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese.

gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.name: GigaAM v3
gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.description: Russian speech recognition. Fast and accurate.

canary-180m-flash.name: Canary 180M Flash
canary-180m-flash.description: Very fast. English, German, Spanish, French. Supports translation.

canary-1b-v2.name: Canary 1B v2
canary-1b-v2.description: Accurate multilingual. 25 European languages. Supports translation.

cohere-int8.name: Cohere
cohere-int8.description: A large, slower, but very accurate multilingual model.

openai_stt.name: OpenAI
openai_stt.description: OpenAI's cloud speech-to-text API. Fast and accurate with support for 57+ languages.

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.description: ElevenLabs Scribe speech-to-text. High accuracy with 90+ language support.

groq.name: Groq
groq.description: Groq's ultra-fast Whisper transcription. Lightning-fast inference with 99+ language support.

soniox.name: Soniox
soniox.description: Soniox cloud speech-to-text. High accuracy with realtime transcription.

deepgram.name: Deepgram
deepgram.description: Deepgram's Nova speech-to-text API. Fast and accurate with 50+ language support.

assemblyai.name: AssemblyAI
assemblyai.description: AssemblyAI speech-to-text. Enterprise-grade accuracy with speaker diarization and 40+ languages.

cartesia.name: Cartesia
cartesia.description: Cartesia's Ink speech-to-text API. Real-time streaming transcription with 99+ language support.

mistral.name: Mistral AI
mistral.description: Mistral AI's Voxtral speech-to-text. High accuracy with context biasing support.

fireworks.name: Fireworks AI
fireworks.description: Fireworks AI speech-to-text. Ultra-fast Whisper transcription with 95+ language support.

doubao.name: Doubao
doubao.description: ByteDance Doubao speech-to-text. High-quality recognition optimized for Chinese with multi-language support.

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: Handless needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: Required to hear your voice for transcription.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Required to type transcribed text into your applications.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

modelSettings.title: {{model}} Settings
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: This model works automatically with no configuration needed.

shortcut.title: Handless Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts to trigger speech-to-text recording

transcribe.name: Transcribe Shortcut
transcribe.description: The keyboard shortcut to record and transcribe your voice.

cancel.name: Cancel Shortcut
cancel.description: The keyboard shortcut to cancel the current recording.

transcribe_with_post_process.name: Post-Processing Hotkey
transcribe_with_post_process.description: Optional: A dedicated hotkey that always applies AI post-processing to your transcription.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language for speech recognition. Auto will automatically determine the language, while selecting a specific language can improve accuracy for that language.
language.descriptionUnsupported: Parakeet model automatically detects the language. No manual selection is needed.

activationMode.label: Activation Mode
activationMode.description: How the shortcut key controls recording

models.title: Transcription Models
models.description: Select a transcription model or download additional models. Different models offer varying levels of accuracy and speed.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{modelName}}? You will need to download it again to use it.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} is your active model. Deleting it will stop transcriptions until you select a new model. Are you sure?

cloudProviders.title: Cloud Providers
cloudProviders.realtimeDescription: Uses a WebSocket connection instead of file upload for lower latency

options.promptDescription: Optional text to guide the model's style or continue a previous segment. Not supported by gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize.
options.temperatureDescription: Higher values produce more random results (0-1). Only supported by whisper-1.
options.languageHintsStrictDescription: Only transcribe in the specified languages
options.contextTermsDescription: Comma-separated terms to improve recognition accuracy
options.contextDescriptionDescription: Freeform text providing general context about the audio content
options.smartFormatDescription: Apply formatting for improved readability including punctuation, capitalization, and more
options.punctuateDescription: Add punctuation and capitalization to the transcript
options.contextBiasDescription: Comma-separated terms to guide the model toward correct spellings
options.enableItnDescription: Convert spoken numbers, dates, and units to written form
options.enableDdcDescription: Remove filler words, hesitations, and repetitions for smoother text

doubao.appKeyDescription: Your Volcengine App ID (from the Speech console)
doubao.resourceIdDescription: Your Volcengine speech resource ID (from the Speech console)

myModels.noModelsConfigured: No models configured. Visit the Library to download models or set up cloud providers.

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.description: Preference order — when a microphone is unavailable, the next one will be used as a fallback.

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

exportData.title: Export Data
exportData.description: Export your settings, history, and recordings to a file

importData.title: Import Data
importData.description: Import settings and data from a previously exported file
importData.warning: Importing settings will overwrite your current configuration. The export file may contain API keys.
importData.invalidFile: The selected file is not a valid Handless export

startHidden.label: Start Hidden
startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start Handless when you log in to your computer.

showTrayIcon.label: Show Tray Icon
showTrayIcon.description: Display the Handless icon in the system tray.

overlay.title: Overlay Feedback
overlay.description: Display a visual overlay during recording and transcription for immediate status feedback.

pasteMethod.title: Paste Method
pasteMethod.description: Choose how text is inserted. Direct: simulates typing via system input. None: skips paste, only updates history/clipboard.

typingTool.title: Typing Tool
typingTool.description: Choose which Linux typing tool to use for Direct paste method. Auto will automatically detect and use the best available tool for your system.

clipboardHandling.title: Clipboard Handling
clipboardHandling.description: Don't Modify Clipboard preserves your current clipboard contents after transcription. Copy to Clipboard leaves the transcription result in your clipboard after pasting.

autoSubmit.title: Auto Submit
autoSubmit.description: Automatically send the selected key combination after text insertion. Cmd+Enter applies on macOS, while Windows/Linux use Super+Enter.

translateToEnglish.label: Translate to English
translateToEnglish.description: Automatically translate speech from other languages to English during transcription.
translateToEnglish.descriptionUnsupported: Translation is not supported by the {{model}} model.

modelUnload.title: Unload Model
modelUnload.description: Automatically free GPU/CPU memory when the model hasn't been used for the specified time

customWords.title: Custom Words
customWords.description: Add words that are often misheard or misspelled during transcription. The system will automatically correct similar-sounding words to match your list.

configFile.title: Configuration File
configFile.description: Open or reload the settings JSON file

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: Runs fully on-device. No API key or network access is required.
appleIntelligence.requirements: Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later. Apple Intelligence must be enabled in System Settings.
appleIntelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later with Apple Intelligence enabled in System Settings.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: API base URL for the selected provider. Only the custom provider can be edited.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

model.title: Model
model.descriptionApple: Provide an optional numeric token limit or keep the default on-device preset.
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected provider.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Enter your provider's pricing to see cost estimates.

prompts.title: Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Select a template for refining transcriptions or create a new one. The captured transcript is automatically provided to the prompt.

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Write the instructions to run after transcription. The transcript is automatically appended.
prompts.promptTip: Tip: Focus on formatting and correction style. The transcript is always appended automatically.
prompts.createFirst: Prompts transform your transcriptions — fix grammar, format text, or translate.
prompts.costTooltip: System prompt: ~{{systemTokens}} tokens. Assumes avg 100-word transcript (~140 input tokens, ~120 output tokens). Total per request: ~{{totalInputTokens}} input + ~{{totalOutputTokens}} output tokens.
prompts.errorCreate: Failed to create prompt. Please try again.
prompts.errorUpdate: Failed to update prompt. Please try again.
prompts.errorDelete: Failed to delete prompt. Please try again.

stats.title: Speaking Stats
stats.noDataHint: Your speaking analytics will appear here.

history.title: History
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.

logDirectory.title: Log Directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored

updateChecks.label: Check for Updates
updateChecks.description: Automatically check for new versions of Handless

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: Choose a sound theme for recording start and stop feedback
soundTheme.preview: Preview sound theme (plays start then stop)

recordingRetention.title: History Cleanup
recordingRetention.description: Automatically delete old unsaved entries to save space
recordingRetention.confirmDelete: This will permanently delete {{count}} unsaved recording(s) and their audio files.
recordingRetention.noEntriesAffected: No entries will be deleted with this setting.

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Always-On Microphone
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep microphone active for faster response

clamshellMicrophone.title: Clamshell Microphone
clamshellMicrophone.description: Microphone to use when laptop lid is closed

postProcessingToggle.label: Post Processing
postProcessingToggle.description: Enable AI-powered text refinement after transcription

appendTrailingSpace.label: Append Trailing Space
appendTrailingSpace.description: Add a space after pasted transcription

keyboardImplementation.title: Keyboard Implementation
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: Keyboard shortcuts were incompatible and reset to defaults

pasteDelay.title: Paste Delay
pasteDelay.description: Delay before sending paste keystroke (in milliseconds). Increase if wrong text is being pasted.

appDataDirectory.title: App Data Directory
appDataDirectory.description: Location where Handless stores its data

handy.title: Handy
handy.description: The open-source speech-to-text app that Handless was forked from
handy.details: Built on Handy by CJ Pais. Thanks for the foundation.

dictionary.title: Dictionary

terms.title: Terms
terms.description: Words and phrases the speech engine should recognize accurately. These are sent to the provider before transcription to improve recognition of domain-specific vocabulary.
terms.empty: No terms added. Type a term and press Enter.

context.title: Context Description
context.description: Freeform text that gives the speech engine background context about what you're dictating. Helps improve accuracy for domain-specific content.
context.placeholder: e.g. Technical discussion about React components and TypeScript interfaces

dictionary.autoInjectedHint: Auto-filled from Dictionary. Click to edit.

customWords.title: Word Corrections
customWords.subtitle: Rule-based post-processing · All providers
customWords.description: Words that are often misheard or misspelled after transcription. The system will automatically correct similar-sounding words in the output to match your list. This is applied after transcription, unlike terms which guide the engine before transcription.
customWords.empty: No corrections added. Type a word and press Enter.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: Handless needs accessibility permissions to type transcribed text.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the Handless interface
